sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27748" key="diwgmhtika/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διωγ-μητικά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n27748.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fees,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">persecutiones,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.30.4.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
